toolSpec.name: read_documentation
toolSpec.description: Fetch and convert an AWS documentation page to markdown format.

url.description: URL of the AWS documentation page to read

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return.

start_index.description: On return output starting at this character index, useful if a previous fetch was truncated and more content is required.

toolSpec.name: search_documentation
toolSpec.description: Search AWS documentation using the official AWS Documentation Search API.

search_intent.description: For the search_phrase parameter, describe the search intent of the user. CRITICAL: Do not include any PII or customer data, describe only the AWS-related intent for search.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

product_types.description: Filter results by AWS product/service (e.g., ["Amazon Simple Storage Service"])

guide_types.description: Filter results by guide type (e.g., ["User Guide", "API Reference", "Developer Guide"])

toolSpec.name: recommend
toolSpec.description: Get content recommendations for an AWS documentation page.

url.description: URL of the AWS documentation page to get recommendations for
